proposal1.heroHeadline: Greatoutdoorguides is losing 200 hours annually on manual proposals. Here's why it matters.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Your guides spend hours crafting proposals manually. With our system, proposals are ready in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every problem below siphons time and resources from your core guiding services.

problems.title: Time-Consuming Drafts
problems.description: Each proposal takes 3 hours to draft manually. That's 600 hours a year not spent guiding clients through nature.

problems.title: Lost Opportunities
problems.description: Delays in proposal delivery can cost you new clients. Every 24-hour delay risks a lost booking to competitors.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Inconsistent proposal branding causes confusion. It's an estimated $10,000 in lost potential trust and bookings annually.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Staff time spent on proposals costs $15,000 a year. This is money not reinvested in expanding your guiding team.

problems.title: Error-Prone Processes
problems.description: Errors in manual proposals lead to corrections and client distrust. Fixing mistakes leaks $5,000 yearly.

problems.title: Wasted Resources
problems.description: Manual tracking of proposals wastes both time and effort. It's an extra 100 hours a year that should be spent outdoors.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system eliminates these inefficiencies, transforming your proposal process entirely.

solutions.title: Instant Proposals
solutions.description: Currently, proposals are drafted by hand. Our system generates them in under a minute, saving hours.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual proposals risk brand inconsistency. Our system ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with your brand.

solutions.title: Error-Free Documents
solutions.description: Manual entries lead to errors. Our AI ensures each proposal is error-free, boosting client confidence.

solutions.title: Automated Tracking
solutions.description: Tracking proposals manually wastes time. Our system tracks everything automatically, providing real-time updates.

solutions.title: AI Chatbot Integration
solutions.description: Client queries require manual responses. Our integrated chatbot handles them instantly, improving client interactions.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Greatoutdoorguides's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Greatoutdoorguides around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Greatoutdoorguides.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Unlock Acme Corp's Potential with Expert Guidance from Greatoutdoorguides

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves your site without converting is revenue walking out the door. This results in an estimated 30% potential revenue loss monthly.

problems.title: Poor Customer Retention
problems.description: Retention rates are dropping, causing an estimated 20% loss in repeat business annually. Loyal customers are crucial for sustainability.

problems.title: Ineffective Marketing
problems.description: Current marketing strategies are not reaching the target audience, leading to a 25% underperformance in brand awareness.

problems.title: Operational Inefficiencies
problems.description: Inefficiencies in operations are costing Acme Corp around 15% in potential profit annually. Streamlining processes is essential.

problems.title: Subpar Client Engagement
problems.description: Missed opportunities in client engagement result in a 10% loss in potential upsells and cross-sells monthly.

problems.title: Lack of Market Adaptation
problems.description: Failure to adapt to market trends results in a 22% loss in competitive edge, affecting overall growth.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our comprehensive solutions directly address these losses, turning potential into profit.
